summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact shows no shared canonical and no security-sensitive refs; merges, fixes, raise_pr, force_push, and bypass_checks are blocked. Hydrated PRs are kept as independent open PRs for normal maintainer review; unhydrated listed candidates require fresh preflight before classification.

actions.reason: Independent focused PR; plan mode and blocked merge action mean keep for maintainer review.
